Name: Name
emptyStateSubtitle: This shortcut is a placeholder. Full filters, quick add, and settings are available on larger screens.
emptyStateTip: Tap outside the card or the backdrop to close.
You do not have permission to access thi: You do not have permission to access this page.
Text size hint: Adjusts the base size of text across the app (stored on this device).
Spacing hint: Tightens or loosens padding, gaps, and margins from the design default.
Radius hint: Controls how rounded buttons, cards, and inputs appear.
Layout prefs active hint: You have custom layout options. Reset them to use the app defaults.
dashIntro: Overview of usage, traffic, and recent activity. Data below is mock data for layout preview.
dashSectionTrafficHint: Weekly new accounts vs request volume (mock).
dashSectionCompareHint: Two series you might track side by side.
dashSectionActivityHint: Latest actions in the system (placeholder feed).
aboutLead: This page uses sample copy so you can preview layout, typography, and spacing. Replace it with your real product story when you are ready.
aboutProductP1: Acme Console is a fictional admin workspace: users, permissions, preferences, and a dashboard with mock charts. It is meant as a starting point for Laravel + Vue apps.
aboutProductP2: Nothing here talks to production data unless you wire it up. Treat the numbers and lists below as placeholders for marketing or onboarding content.
aboutFeature1: Role-based access with a simple permissions model you can extend.
aboutFeature2: Theme, language, density, and accent controls stored on the device.
aboutFeature3: Responsive shell with a dedicated mobile navigation pattern.
aboutFeature4: REST-style API stubs you can swap for real Laravel endpoints.
aboutStatsHint: Illustrative figures only — swap for analytics or live counters later.
aboutPlaceholderNote: All of the above is example content for development and design review.
